page_content:
Repeatable to: 4 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. BSOS338P or MLSC308.

Formerly: BSOS388P.

MUED - Music Education

MUED155 Fundamentals for the Classroom Teacher (3 Credits)

The fundamentals of music theory and practice, related to the needs of the classroom and the kindergarten teacher.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Early Childhood Education; Elementary Education) ; or must be a Pre-Elementary Education major; or must be a Pre-Early Childhood Education major.
